title: 他是谁
prompt_en: Practice describing family with He/She is and He/She has.
prompt_zh: 练习用He/She is和He/She has描述家人。
description: 掌握第三人称be动词和have→has的用法。
knowledge_points: 第三人称 be has 家人
teaching_markdown:
## 核心句型
- He is my father. She is my mother.
- He is a doctor. She is a teacher.
- He is very tall. She is very kind.
- His name is Tom. Her name is Anna.
注意：has是have的第三人称单数形式。

title: 他有什么
prompt_en: Practice talking about possession in third person with has.
prompt_zh: 练习第三人称表达拥有：has/doesn't have。
description: 掌握has和doesn't have表达拥有和没有。
knowledge_points: has doesn't have 拥有
teaching_markdown:
## 拥有表达
- He has a car. She has a cat.
- He has two brothers.
- He doesn't have a phone.
doesn't have = does not have。

title: 她喜欢什么
prompt_en: Practice expressing likes and dislikes in third person.
prompt_zh: 练习第三人称表达喜好：likes/doesn't like/Does...?。
description: 掌握like→likes否定和疑问形式。
knowledge_points: 第三人称 likes doesn't like 疑问
teaching_markdown:
## 喜好表达
- She likes music. He likes sports.
- He likes to read books.
- She doesn't like cold weather.
- Does he like sports? Yes he does.
- What does she like? She likes music.
第三人称like加s。

title: 家人职业
prompt_en: Practice describing family members jobs and workplaces.
prompt_zh: 练习描述家人的职业和工作地点。
description: 掌握职业名称和工作地点表达。
knowledge_points: 职业 工作 医院 学校
teaching_markdown:
## 家人职业
- My mother is a nurse. She works in a hospital.
- He is a firefighter. He helps people.
职业前要加a/an：He is a doctor。

title: 家人习惯
prompt_en: Practice describing family habits with frequency adverbs.
prompt_zh: 练习用频率副词描述家人习惯。
description: 掌握always/usually等频率副词与第三人称搭配。
knowledge_points: 频率 习惯 always
teaching_markdown:
## 家人习惯
- My dad always gets up early.
- She always drinks tea in the morning.
频率副词在动词前。

title: 他每天做什么
prompt_en: Practice daily actions in third person with verb+s/es/ies.
prompt_zh: 练习第三人称日常动词变化+s/es/ies。
description: 掌握一般动词的第三人称单数变化规则。
knowledge_points: 第三人称 动词变化 s es ies
teaching_markdown:
## 动词变化
- He gets up at 7 every morning.
- She goes to school by bus.
- He eats lunch at school.
- She drinks water after exercise.
- He doesn't eat junk food.
规则：一般+s，go→goes(es)，study→studies(ies)。

title: 她几点起床
prompt_en: Practice talking about someone's daily schedule.
prompt_zh: 练习描述他人的作息时间。
description: 掌握第三人称时间表达：gets up/comes home/goes to bed。
knowledge_points: 作息 时间 起床 睡觉
teaching_markdown:
## 作息时间
- She gets up at 6 every day.
- He comes home at 6 pm.
- She goes to bed at 10 pm.
第三人称动词要用变化形式。

title: 工作与学习
prompt_en: Practice describing jobs and study in third person.
prompt_zh: 练习第三人称描述工作和学习。
description: 掌握works/studies/teaches等第三人称动词。
knowledge_points: 工作 学习 第三人称
teaching_markdown:
## 工作与学习
- He works in a hospital.
- She studies English at university.
- He teaches music at a school.
- She watches TV after dinner.
- He does his homework in the evening.
works/studies/teaches都是第三人称变化。

title: 疑问与回答
prompt_en: Practice asking questions in third person with Does and Where.
prompt_zh: 练习第三人称疑问句：Does...? / Where does...?。
description: 掌握Does和Where does疑问句及简短回答。
knowledge_points: Does 疑问 回答
teaching_markdown:
## 疑问句
- Does he work on weekends? No he doesn't.
- Where does she study? She studies at a university.
Does+动词原形。回答用does/doesn't。

title: 周末活动
prompt_en: Practice describing weekend activities in third person.
prompt_zh: 练习描述他/她的周末活动。
description: 掌握第三人称周末活动表达。
knowledge_points: 周末 活动 第三人称
teaching_markdown:
## 周末活动
- He plays football on weekends.
- She visits her grandparents on Sundays.
- He relaxes at home.
注意play→plays visit→visits relax→relaxes。

title: 我和你vs他/她
prompt_en: Practice contrasting I vs He/She in present simple.
prompt_zh: 练习对比第一人称和第三人称的动词变化。
description: 掌握I vs He/She的对比表达和don't vs doesn't。
knowledge_points: 对比 第一人称 第三人称 doesn't
teaching_markdown:
## 核心对比
- I like music and she likes music too.
- I like coffee but she doesn't like coffee.
- I don't have a pet but she has a cat.
- I have a brother and he has a sister.
- I get up at 6 but he gets up at 8.
I用动词原形，he/she用动词+s。

title: 肯定与否定
prompt_en: Practice affirmative vs negative in first and third person.
prompt_zh: 练习第一和第三人称的肯定句与否定句对比。
description: 掌握don't vs doesn't的对比。
knowledge_points: 肯定 否定 don't doesn't
teaching_markdown:
## 肯定vs否定
- I like coffee but she doesn't like coffee.
- I eat breakfast but he eats lunch only.
- I have a bike but she doesn't have a bike.
I用don't，he/she用doesn't。

title: have vs has
prompt_en: Practice have for I vs has for he/she.
prompt_zh: 练习I用have和he/she用has的对比。
description: 掌握have和has在不同人称中的使用。
knowledge_points: have has 拥有 对比
teaching_markdown:
## have vs has
- I have a brother and he has a sister.
- I don't have a pet but she has a cat.
- I have a bike but she doesn't have a bike.
I用have，he/she用has。

title: 时间习惯对比
prompt_en: Practice time habit comparison between I and he/she.
prompt_zh: 练习我与他/她的时间习惯对比。
description: 掌握时间表达在不同人称中的使用。
knowledge_points: 时间 习惯 对比
teaching_markdown:
## 时间习惯对比
- I get up at 6 but he gets up at 8.
- My name is Tom. His name is Jack.
注意物主代词的变化：my→his/her。

title: 他们的生活
prompt_en: Practice describing groups and using possessive forms.
prompt_zh: 练习描述群体和使用所有格形式。
description: 掌握复数主语、their和's所有格用法。
knowledge_points: 复数 their 所有格 群体
teaching_markdown:
## 他们的生活
- They live in Beijing.
- My parents work very hard.
- The children play in the park.
- People here speak Chinese.
- Their house is very big.
- Tom's mother is a nurse.
- Everyone likes him.
复数主语动词不加s。

title: 他做什么工作
prompt_en: Practice describing jobs in third person.
prompt_zh: 练习第三人称描述职业和工作内容。
description: 掌握职业描述和工作动词表达。
knowledge_points: 职业 描述 工作
teaching_markdown:
## 职业描述
- He is a firefighter. He helps people.
- He drives a taxi. He works at night.
- He wants to be a scientist.
用He/She is a + 职业描述。

title: 工作描述
prompt_en: Practice describing workplaces and job characteristics.
prompt_zh: 练习描述工作地点和工作特点。
description: 掌握工作地点和评价工作的表达。
knowledge_points: 工作 地点 评价
teaching_markdown:
## 工作描述
- My aunt works in a hospital. She takes care of patients.
- His job is very interesting. He travels a lot.
- She works from home. She is a writer.
用works in/at描述工作地点。

title: 场景描述
prompt_en: Practice describing scenes with Look and In the picture.
prompt_zh: 练习用Look和In the picture描述场景。
description: 掌握场景描述的基本句型。
knowledge_points: 场景 描述 Look picture
teaching_markdown:
## 场景描述
- Look! The boy is running after his dog.
- In the picture a girl is reading under a tree.
Look! + be + doing描述正在发生的动作。

title: 简单故事
prompt_en: Practice telling simple stories with past tense and connecting words.
prompt_zh: 练习用过去式和连接词讲简单故事。
description: 掌握简单叙事的基本表达。
knowledge_points: 故事 过去式 连接
teaching_markdown:
## 简单故事
- She opened the door and smiled at me.
- Suddenly it started to rain. Everyone ran home.
用过去式描述发生过的事。

title: 图片描述
prompt_en: Practice describing pictures with There was and I saw.
prompt_zh: 练习用There was和I saw描述图片。
description: 掌握图片描述的基本句型。
knowledge_points: 图片 描述 There was I saw
teaching_markdown:
## 图片描述
- There was a big dog in the park. It was very friendly.
- I saw a man on the street. He looked happy.
- He told me a funny story. I laughed so hard!
There was + 名词 + in + 地点。
